units.name: Gazzghull Thraka
units.abilities:
Great Waaagh!: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of other friendly Ork Light units whilst they are making Fight actions whilst within 6" of this unit.
Waaagh!: Re-roll hit rolls of 1 for attacks made with melee weapons by friendly Goff units whilst they are within 6" of this unit.

options.text: Ghazghkull Thraka is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Kustom Klaw; Twin Big Shoota. You can only include one of this unit in your army.

units.name: Warboss
units.abilities:
Waaagh!: Re-roll hit rolls of 1 for attacks made with melee weapons by friendly <Clan> units whilst they are within 6" of this unit.
Ignore Damage (+6)

options.text: A Warboss is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Boss Weapons.

units.name: Big Mek
units.abilities:
Big Mekaniak: At the end of the Action phase, this unit can attempt to repair one friendly <Clan> Vehicle unit in base contact with it. If it does, roll one D6; on a 4+ remove one damage marker from that Vehicle unit. Only one attempt to repair each unit can be made each turn.
Kustom Force Field: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by ranged weapons that target <Clan> units whilst they are wholly within 9" of any friendly <Clan> units with a Kustom Force Field.
A Big Mek is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Shokk Attack Gun; Mek Weapons.
This unit can have Mega Armour. If this unit has Mega Armour, it:
- Is equipped with Mek Mega Weapons instead of 1 Shokk Attack Gun and Mek Weapons.
- Has a Move characteristic of 4", and Save characteristic of 4+.
- Has the following keyword: Mega Armour.
- Can be equipped with a Tellyport Blasta (Power Rating +1) or can also have a Kustom Force Field (Power Rating +1). If this unit has a Kustom Force Field it has the following additional abilities: Kustom Force Field.

options.text: This unit can have Mega Armour.
- Is equipped with Mek Mega Weapons instead of 1 Shokk Attack Gun and Mek Weapons.
Can be equipped with a Tellyport Blasta (Power Rating +1)
can also have a Kustom Force Field (Power Rating +1)

units.name: Weirdboy
units.abilities: Waaagh! Energy: At the start of the Action phase, if this unit is within 6" of three or more friendly <Clan> units that each contain at least 10 models, you can turn over the top 3 cards of your Command Asset deck. If you reveal any Command Asset cards that are psychic powers, you can select one of those psychic powers and put in into your hand. Then put the remaining cards back in your Command Asset deck and shuffle the deck.

options.text: A Weirdboy is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Weirdboy Staff.

units.name: Deffkilla Wartrike
units.abilities: Speedwaaagh!: If a <Clan> Speed Freeks unit starts a Move action within 6" of any friendly units with this ability, add 3" to that unit's Move characteristic whilst making that Move action.

options.text: A Deffkilla Wartrike is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Killa Jet; Snagga Klaw.

units.name: Boyz
units.abilities:
Boyz are a unit that contains 10 models. It can contain 20 models (Power Rating 10) or 30 models (Power Rating 15). It is equipped with: Sluggas; Choppas.
For every 10 models in the unit, it can also be equipped with one of the following: 1 Big Shoota; 1 Rokkit Launcha.

options.text: It can contain 20 models (Power Rating 10)
30 models (Power Rating 15)

units.name: Gretchin
units.abilities:
Gretchin are a unit that contains 10 models. It can contain 20 models (Power Rating 2) or 30 models (Power Rating 3). It is equipped with: Grot Blastas; Close Combat Weapons.
This unit can include a Runtherd (Power Rating +1). If this unit includes a Runtherd, it has a Leadership characteristic of 6.

options.text: It can contain 20 models (Power Rating 2)
30 models (Power Rating 3)

units.name: Painboy
units.abilities: Sawbonez: At the end of the Action phase, this unit can attempt to heal one friendly <Clan> Light unit in base contact with it. If it does, roll one D6; on a 4+, remove one damage marker from that Light unit. Only one attempt to heal each unit can be made each turn.

options.text: A Painboy is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Dok's Tools.

options.text: A Mek is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Mek's Tools.

units.name: Tankbustaz
units.abilities:
Bomb Squigs: Once per battle, after this unit makes a Shoot action, select one enemy Vehicle unit (other than an Aircraft) within 18" of this unit and roll one D6. On a 4+ place one blast marker next to that unit.
Tank Hunters: You can re-roll hit rolls for attacks made by this unit that target Vehicle units.
Tankbustas are a unit that contains 5 models. It can contain 10 models (Power Rating 8) or 15 models (Power Rating 12). It is equipped with: Tankbusta Rokkit Launchas; Tankbusta Weapons.

options.text: It can contain 10 models (Power Rating 8)
15 models (Power Rating 12)

units.abilities: Waaagh! Banner: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made with melee weapons by <Clan> units whilst they are within 6" of any friendly <Clan> units with this ability.

options.text: A Nob with Waaagh! Banner is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Waaagh! Banner.

Ram: After this unit makes a Move action, if it is in base contact with any enemy units, select one of those units and roll one D6. On a 5+ place one blast marker next to that unit.

units.name: Mek Gun
units.abilities:
Artillery Battery: Each Heavy Support slot in a Detachment allows you to take up to three of this unit in your army, instead of one. Each unit taken for a single Heavy Support slot must be placed at the same time and within 6" of each other unit taken for the same slot the first time they are set up.
A Mek Gun is a unit that contains 6 models. The unit is equipped with: Close Combat Weapons.
This unit must also be equipped with one of the following: 1 Bubblechukka; 1 Kustom Mega-Kannon; 1 Smasha Gun; 1 Traktor Kannon.
This unit can include a Runtherd (Power Rating +1). If this unit includes a Runtherd, it has a Leadership characteristic of 6.

options.text: This unit must also be equipped with one of the following: 1 Bubblechukka; 1 Kustom Mega-Kannon; 1 Smasha Gun; 1 Traktor Kannon.
This unit can include a Runtherd (Power Rating +1)

units.name: Battlewagon
units.abilities:
Open-topped
A Battlewagon is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Wagon Melee Weapons.
This unit can also be equipped with 1 Lobba (Power Rating +1).
This unit can also be equipped with one of the following (Power Rating +1): 1 Kannon; 1 Killkannon; 1 Zzap Gun.
This unit can also be equipped with up to 4 Big Shootas (Power Rating +1 per weapon).
Instead of Wagon Melee Weapons, this unit can be equipped with 1 Deff Rolla (Power Rating +1).
This unit can have an 'Ard Case. If this unit has an 'Ard Case, it: Has a Save characteristic of 6+; loses the following abilities: Open-topped.
Transport: This unit can transport up to 20 friendly Flash Gitz or <Clan> Infantry models. Each Mega Armour or Jump Pack model takes the space of 2 other Infantry models. If this unit is equipped with a Killkannon, it can only transport up to 12 models.

options.text: This unit can also be equipped with 1 Lobba (Power Rating +1).
This unit can also be equipped with one of the following (Power Rating +1): 1 Kannon; 1 Killkannon; 1 Zzap Gun.
This unit can also be equipped with up to 4 Big Shootas (Power Rating +1 per weapon).
Instead of Wagon Melee Weapons, this unit can be equipped with 1 Deff Rolla (Power Rating +1).
This unit can have an 'Ard Case.

units.name: Deff Dread
units.abilities:
Dread Mob: Each Heavy Support slot in a Detachment allows you to take up to three of this unit in your army, instead of one. Each unit taken for a single Heavy Support slot must be placed at the same time and within 6" of each other unit taken for the same slot the first time they are set up.
A Deff Dread is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Armoured Feet; 2 Dread Klaws.
Instead of 1 Dread Klaw, this unit can be equipped with one of the following: 1 Rokkit Launcha; 1 Kustom Mega-Blasta; 1 Skorcha; 1 Dread Saw.
Instead of 2 Dread Klaws, this unit can be equipped with two of the following in any combination: 1 Rokkit Launcha; 1 Kustom Mega-Blasta; 1 Skorcha; 1 Dread Saw.
This unit must be equipped with two of the following in any combination: 1 Big Shoota; 1 Rokkit Launcha; 1 Skorcha; 1 Kustom Mega-blasta; 1 Dread Saw.

options.text: Instead of 1 Dread Klaw, this unit can be equipped with one of the following: 1 Rokkit Launcha; 1 Kustom Mega-Blasta; 1 Skorcha; 1 Dread Saw.

This unit must be equipped with two of the following in any combination: 1 Big Shoota; 1 Rokkit Launcha; 1 Skorcha; 1 Kustom Mega-blasta; 1 Dread Saw.

units.name: Morkanaut
units.abilities:
Kustom Force Field: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by ranged weapons that target <Clan> units whilst they are wholly within 9" of any friendly <Clan> units with a Kustom Force Field.
A Morkanaut is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: 2 Twin Big Shootas; 2 Rokkit Launchas; Kustom Mega-zappa; Kustom Mega-blasta; Klaw of Gork (or possibly Mork).
This unit can have a Kustom Force Field. If this unit has a Kustom Force Field, it has the following additional abilities: Kustom Force Field.
Transport: This unit can transport up to 6 friendly Flash Gitz or <Clan> Infantry models. Each Mega Armour or Jump Pack model takes the space of 2 other Infantry models.

options.text: This unit can have a Kustom Force Field.

units.name: Dakka Jet
units.abilities:
Supersonic
All da Dakka: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by this unit with ranged weapons.
A Dakkajet is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: 4 Supa-shootas; Armoured Bulk.
This unit can also be equipped with 2 Supa-shootas (Power Rating +1).

options.text: This unit can also be equipped with 2 Supa-shootas (Power Rating +1).

units.name: Bomba
units.abilities:
Supersonic
Burna Bombs: After this unit makes a Move action, select one enemy unit it moved over whilst making that Move action. Roll three D6, subtracting 1 from each result if that unit is a Character and adding 1 to each result if that unit is garrisoning a Defensible Terrain feature; for each result of 4+ place one blast marker next to that unit.
A Burna-bommer is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Twin Big Shoota; 2 Supa-shootas; Armoured Bulk.
This unit can also be equipped with Skorcha Missiles (Power Rating +1).

options.text: This unit can also be equipped with Skorcha Missiles (Power Rating +1).

units.name: Stompa
units.abilities:
Effigy: You can re-roll Morale tests taken for friendly Orks units whilst they are within 6" of this unit.
Stompa Rigger Crew: At the end of the Action phase, this unit can attempt to repair itself. If it does, roll one D6; on a 4+, remove one damage marker from this unit. Only one attempt to repair each unit can be made each turn.
A Stompa is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Deffkannon; Supa-gatler; 3 Big Shootas; 3 Supa-rokkits; Skorcha; Mega-choppa.
This unit can also be equipped with 2 Supa-rokkits (Power Rating +2).
Transport: This unit can transport up to 20 friendly Flash Gitz or <Clan> Infantry models. Each Mega Armour or Jump Pack model takes the space of 2 other Infantry models.

options.text: This unit can also be equipped with 2 Supa-rokkits (Power Rating +2).
